## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change.

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Ran local checks (lint/type/tests)

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs/README when behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept changes focused and backwards-compatible where possible.
- [ ] I verified packaging metadata if relevant (`pyproject.toml`, versioning, etc.).

## Related Issues

Link issues here (for example, `Closes #123`).
